hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json; if ($p.tool_input.command -match '^\s*git\s+commit\b') { @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';additionalContext='Run the commit-guardian skill at .claude/skills/commit-guardian/SKILL.md before this commit. Check staged changes against ADRs in docs/adr/ and conventions in CLAUDE.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/STYLE-GUIDE.md.'}}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 5 }"
